values.f2: I agree with Jacob on this level.Very stong on his ablility to diag cars. Jacob at times will strugle with elictrical diag on cars.
values.f4: Jacob is very strong in heavy engine repair and suspension repair.
values.f5: Needs inprovement in electrical diag on cars. Jacob is very good at basic electrical diag but advanced elictrical diag will tend to struggle.
values.f10: Jacob is above average in effciency
values.f12: Jacob does verify his repairs are done corectly.
values.f17: Jacob does struggle with proper documention when completing proper CCC on the repair order.
values.f19: Jacob does contribute to the team when techs need assentance with cars.
values.f23: Up to date with Hyundai certified level and expert level. Excel level jacob has started on this level of training. Training website is curently under contruction at this time.
values.f24: I would like Jacob to complete his Excel level training.
values.f30: Fully agree with Jacob on this
values.f31: fully agree with Jacob on this.
values.f34: No action plan needed. Jacob needs to continue to grow his advance elictrical skills. Jacob will complete his Excel learning path and this will bettery help his ability to grow in his advanced elictrial skills level.
